global.description: The ad features a blue background with a prominent headline and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape at an affordable price.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Bold white text prominently displayed in the center, conveying a sense of urgency.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline, providing additional information about the offer.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button with white text that invites users to take action.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A prominent price displayed in white, emphasizing the affordability of the offer.

elements.label: NomadLayer logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left corner, representing the brand.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating user-generated content, located near the logo.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: An abstract shape that adds visual interest but does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: Another abstract shape that complements the overall design.
